Entry point for a dynamic portfolio. Initializes loader and waits for it to complete. Sets up navigation, scroll-based animations, and interactive effects. Lazy-loads the Three.js scene after a delay for performance. Initializes the contact form submission logic. Dependencies: loader.js, navigation.js, animations.js, effects.js, form.js, three-scene.js. Use this as the main script to tie together all portfolio modules.
